_comment: Live-LLM eval cases. `patient` is a seeded OpenEMR FHIR uuid on the target deployment; override --cases for a different environment. Hard assertions: degraded=false + citations present. expect_any is a soft topical check (any one substring, case-insensitive).

cases.name: code-status-grounded
cases.message: What is this patient's code status and goals of care?

cases.name: medications-grounded
cases.message: What are this patient's active medications?

cases.name: allergies-grounded
cases.message: Does this patient have any documented allergies?
